summary: Tested Form Designer bug fixes: 1) Template edit/save works correctly via PATCH API, 2) Documents tab renders with AI search section and attached documents list, 3) AI API timeout configured at 2 minutes. All fixes verified working.

template_update_api.notes: PATCH /api/form-templates/{id} works correctly. Tested name, description, and multiple field updates. Returns 404 for non-existent templates.

formAPI_updateTemplate.notes: Frontend formAPI.updateTemplate accepts { id, data } object format. Cleans payload before sending (removes id, pendingDocuments). Logs update attempts.

documents_tab_rendering.notes: Documents tab renders correctly with: 1) AI Document Search section with Sparkles icon, input field, and 'Ask AI' button, 2) Attached Documents list showing document name, type, and View button. No blank page issue.

document_viewer_null_state.notes: DocumentViewer component shows proper error UI when document is null - displays 'Document Unavailable' message with AlertCircle icon and 'Go Back' button.

ai_api_timeout.notes: AI API calls use dedicated aiApi axios instance with 120000ms (2 minute) timeout. Error handling differentiates between timeouts and actual failures.

template_create.notes: Created test template 'TEST_Template_1775121586' successfully. Toast showed 'Form template created'.

template_edit_via_ui.notes: Edited template via dropdown menu -> Edit. Changed description and saved. Toast showed 'Form template updated'. Dialog closed after save.

critical_code_review_comments: formAPI.updateTemplate properly handles { id, data } object format and cleans payload
Backend PATCH endpoint has enhanced logging for debugging
AI API uses separate axios instance with extended timeout
DocumentViewer handles null document with proper error UI
context_for_next_testing_agent: All three Form Designer bug fixes verified working: 1) Template update via PATCH API works correctly with proper error handling, 2) Documents tab renders with AI search and document list sections, 3) AI API timeout extended to 2 minutes. Test template created during testing can be deleted.
